top_signals.title: Canadian steel sector faces deeper pain than aluminum as tariff uncertainty clouds outlook
top_signals.summary: Federal support package seen as short-term relief while industry braces for prolonged trade disruption.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Central-bank repricing affecting yields, FX, liquidity and equities.

top_signals.title: Collahuasi permit setback jolts Chile copper sector
top_signals.summary: Anglo American and Glencore face renewed delays as Chile reopens review of a major desalination project at the copper mine.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Commodity repricing impacting inflation expectations and industrial supply chains.

top_signals.title: Beyond the native speaker myth: Who ‘owns’ the Japanese language?
top_signals.summary: As Japan considers adding language requirements to permanent residency and other visa categories, it must also reconsider what "proficiency" means.
